// 01 · About The Mission

the shiba that
escaped gravity

Somewhere between the stars and the Base blockchain, a Shiba Inu put on a spacesuit and decided the moon wasn't far enough. Asteroid Shiba X is the cosmic evolution of meme culture — built different, launched fair, and powered entirely by the community.

No venture capitalists. No team wallets. No private rounds. No presale. Just a Shiba, a spacesuit, and an army of degens ready to blast through the atmosphere together.

We are not just a token. We are a movement. A constellation of holders aligned on one mission: deep space or bust.

FAIR LAUNCH NO PRESALE COMMUNITY OWNED BASE NATIVE 0% TEAM
// 02 · The Mission

why asteroid
shiba x wins

01

COSMIC NARRATIVE

Asteroid Shiba X rides the intersection of two unstoppable forces: the Shiba meme legacy and the asteroid narrative that is already detonating across chains. We are the X factor — the wildcard that connects both universes.

02

BASE NATIVE

Base is where the next wave of meme culture is being written. Cheap gas, deep liquidity, Coinbase distribution. We are not migrating here — we were born here. First mover advantage in the cosmic Shiba narrative on Base.

03

PURE COMMUNITY

No team allocation means every single token is in the hands of the community from day one. No dump risk from insiders. No VC exit liquidity. The only wallets that matter are yours. This is what true decentralization looks like.

04

MEME POWER

The strongest asset in crypto is not a whitepaper — it is a meme that refuses to die. The Shiba narrative has survived multiple cycles. Asteroid Shiba X inherits that legacy and adds orbital velocity to it.

05

X FACTOR

The X in our name is not decorative. It represents the unknown variable — the catalyst that changes everything. In mathematics, X solves the equation. In crypto, Asteroid Shiba X is the variable that takes the community to places no Shiba has gone before.

06

LONG HAUL

We are not a 48-hour pump. We are building something that compounds over time — a community, a brand, a cultural artifact that gets referenced years from now as the Shiba that actually made it to deep space.

// 05 · How To Buy

get your bag
in 3 steps

// STEP 01

Get A Wallet

Download MetaMask, Rabby, or Coinbase Wallet. Add the Base network. Write your seed phrase on actual paper — not in your notes app.

// STEP 02

Bridge ETH to Base

Bridge ETH to Base via Coinbase, Relay, or any major CEX with direct Base withdrawals. Gas fees on Base are literally pennies.

// STEP 03

Buy $ASX

Head to Uniswap or any Base DEX, connect your wallet, paste the contract address, and join the mission. Welcome to the cosmos.
